---
title: "02 — Preprocessing & Train/Test Split"
author: "PSTAT 134 — AI Writing Detector"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    theme: simplex
    code-fold: show
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
here::i_am("notebooks/02-preprocessing.qmd")

source(here::here("R", "data.R"))

library(tidyverse)
library(rsample)
```

## Load and basic cleaning

```{r}
df <- load_essays(here::here("data", "raw", "AI_Human.csv")) |>
  mutate(text = stringr::str_squish(text)) |>
  filter(nchar(text) > 0) |>
  distinct(text, .keep_all = TRUE)

dim(df)
```

## Stratified 80/20 train/test split

We hold out 20% of the data as a test set and only touch it at the very end of
the project. All cross-validation and model selection happens on the training
set.

```{r}
splits <- stratified_split(df)
train_df <- training(splits)
test_df  <- testing(splits)

tibble(
  split  = c("train", "test"),
  n      = c(nrow(train_df), nrow(test_df)),
  pct_ai = c(mean(train_df$generated == "ai"),
             mean(test_df$generated  == "ai")) |> round(3)
)
```

## Save processed splits

```{r}
processed_dir <- here::here("data", "processed")
dir.create(processed_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

readr::write_csv(train_df, file.path(processed_dir, "train.csv"))
readr::write_csv(test_df,  file.path(processed_dir, "test.csv"))

list.files(processed_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$")
```
